title: Trading is a Grind. So I Made It an RPG
description:
*🌀 Discourses | Where Markets are Discussed*
https://discourses.io

*🚀 Master Quantitative Skills with Quant Guild*
https://quantguild.com

*📈 Interactive Brokers for Algorithmic Trading*
https://www.interactivebrokers.com/mkt/?src=quantguildY&url=%2Fen%2Fwhyib%2Foverview.php

*👾 Join the Quant Guild Discord server here*
https://discord.com/invite/MJ4FU2c6c3
___________________________________________
*🪐 Quant Guild Library*
https://github.com/romanmichaelpaolucci/Quant-Guild-Library/tree/main

I hope you enjoyed, and I hope you learned something!

- Roman
___________________________________________
*📖 Chapters:*
- 00:00 - Reading financial news is boring
- 00:52 - Overview of the feed and the RPG-style reward system
- 01:46 - The Symposium and Commons
- 02:38 - The Oracle social prediction market
- 03:28 - Oracle contracts and the inbox system
- 04:24 - Discussing live trading positions
- 06:24 - Uncovering a mythic and exploring the inventory system
- 07:14 - Loot pools and drop probabilities
- 08:08 - Equipping and favoriting inventory items
- 08:52 - Accessing the Exchange to trade items
- 09:34 - Creating a swap contract to exchange rare items
- 10:23 - Listing contracts for the entire ecosystem to fulfill
- 11:17 - Earning Denarii currency through daily posting
- 12:08 - Listing items for Denarii on the Exchange
- 13:09 - Founder badges for early users
___________________________________________
*🗣️ Shout Outs*

A special thank you to my members on YouTube for supporting my channel and enabling me to continue to create videos just like this one!

*⭐ Quant Guild Directors*
Dr. Jason Pirozzolo
